title: Dragon Nest
description: An alternative way to get the dragon egg
body:
This datapack adds some very very rare dragon nests, a new way to obtain dragon egg once the dragon has been killed and that the egg can't be retrieved!

This datapack is vanilla friendly, in the way that originally, the dragon egg is unique, but once the dragon has been killed once, it is normally not possible to get it again, making that only one player can own the dragon egg. But with this datapack, there is still another way to get dragon eggs, but it requires flying a lot through the end islands.

Dragon nests are very rare, so the original value of the dragon egg is near similar to the vanilla game.
